title: corylus maxima var. rubra
intro: Corylus maxima var. rubra is a variety of the common hazel tree, characterized by its vibrant red catkins and edible nuts. The medicinal properties of Corylus maxima var. rubra lie in its nut oil, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Corylus maxima var. rubra can be prepared as a herbal oil, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile and valuable addition to any natural medicine cabinet.
